1.title: 00:00-12:00 Warm Up
1.description:
3 Rounds:
10 McGill curl-ups
10 Bird dogs
200m Row
10 Empty bar squats 20/15 kg
Build to ~60% of working weight across final 2 warm-up sets.
1.notes: Strict lower back protocol every session. Give yourself 2 barbell build-up sets before the benchmark — CNS needs it for a true 3RM.

1.title: 12:00-17:00 Skill / Accessory
1.description:
Wall Ball Progression Phase 1:
4 x 10 quality reps 9/6 kg.
Rest 60 sec between sets.
Focus: full hip extension, consistent target height, controlled catch.
1.notes: Phase 1 wall ball goal is movement quality, not fatigue. Don't rush reps.

1.title: 17:00-40:00 Strength Block
1.description:
Benchmark: Heavy 3RM Back Squat
Build to heavy 3RM (Ref 1RM: 130 kg).
Suggested build: 60 kg x5 / 85 kg x3 / 100 kg x2 / 110 kg x1 / then 3RM attempts.
Reduce posterior chain accessory this session due to heavy squat load.
1.notes: This is a benchmark — treat it as a true max effort. Record the weight. Do not grind more than 2 attempts at top weight.

1.title: 40:00-50:00 MetCon
1.description:
For Time (<8 min):
21-15-9
Thrusters 43/30 kg
Bar-facing burpees
Target: sub-6 min for strong RX athletes.
1.notes: Phosphagen/glycolytic focus. RPE 9. Legs are fatigued from squats — scale thruster weight if needed to hit the time stimulus.

1.title: 50:00-60:00 Cooldown
1.description:
5 min light assault bike or walk.
3 min seated straddle stretch.
2 min supine hip flexor stretch each side.
1.notes: Flush legs actively. Don't just sit down — keep blood moving.

2.title: 00:00-10:00 Warm Up
2.description:
3 Rounds:
10 Dead bugs
30 sec Side plank per side
200m easy Jog or Row
Increase pace each round.
2.notes: Monday = aerobic engine day. No heavy barbell. Goal is oxidative system development. Keep HR in Z2 (conversational) during warm-up.

2.title: 10:00-17:00 Skill / Accessory
2.description:
Wall Ball Progression Phase 1:
4 x 10 quality reps 9/6 kg.
Rest 60 sec.
Focus: breathing rhythm — exhale on the throw, inhale on the catch.
2.notes: Same cue as Sunday but emphasize breathing today. This is skill repetition, not conditioning.

2.title: 17:00-37:00 Strength Block
2.description:
RDL (Phase 1 — no conventional DL from floor):
4x8 @ 65% of DL 1RM = ~97.5 kg / 65 kg.
Rest 2 min between sets.
Accessory: 3x10 Nordic Curls — slow eccentric (3-4 sec down), assisted return.
2.notes: Hinge perfectly. No rounding. This is posterior chain volume work, not a max effort. Nordic curls are the most effective hamstring accessory — take them seriously.

2.title: 37:00-52:00 MetCon
2.description:
Aerobic Engine — 3 Rounds for Time:
500m Row
400m Run
30 sec rest between rounds
Target: consistent splits across all 3 rounds. Row ~2:00/500m, run paced.
2.notes: RPE 7. Oxidative focus. This replaces Fran here — Fran is a sprint MetCon that belongs on Thursday, not the day after a max squat. Do NOT go all-out. The goal is aerobic volume, not glycolytic debt.

2.title: 52:00-60:00 Cooldown
2.description:
8 min stretching.
Focus: hamstrings, lats, hip flexors.
Deep squat hold 2 min.

3.title: 00:00-10:00 Warm Up
3.description:
3 Rounds:
10 Glute bridges
10 Hip hinge drills (dowel on back)
10 PVC snatches with pause at power position
3.notes: Wednesday = Oly + gymnastics + skill. Hip and shoulder prep are the priority. Glute activation protects the lower back under snatch/clean loads.

3.title: 10:00-22:00 Skill / Accessory
3.description:
DU Skill + Benchmark:
Phase 1 DU Protocol: 4 x 45 sec on / 30 sec rest — log total reps each set.
Then: Benchmark — Max unbroken DUs (1 attempt after rest).
DU Skill Cues: Stay on toes, wrists drive the rope (not arms), keep rope arc tight, consistent rhythm not speed.
3.notes: Log total reps for each interval set AND the benchmark number. Aim to beat 30 unbroken. The skill cues are the key — most athletes at 30 unbroken are breaking due to wrist tension or arm swing, not fitness.

3.title: 22:00-42:00 Strength Block
3.description:
Benchmark: 1RM Clean & Jerk
Build to 1RM in ~18 mins (Ref: 82.5 kg).
Suggested build: 50 kg x3 / 60 kg x2 / 70 kg x1 / 77.5 kg x1 / 82.5 kg x1 / attempt new 1RM.
Accessory: 3x10 Weighted Pull-ups — use a load that allows strict reps.
3.notes: Technique over load if back feels tight. This is a benchmark — record the exact weight. Jerk split position must be solid before increasing load.

3.title: 42:00-52:00 MetCon
3.description:
EMOM 10:
Min 1: 15 Kettlebell Swings 24/16 kg
Min 2: 12 Toes to Bar
Target: finish each minute with 15+ sec rest.
3.notes: Moderate intensity RPE 7-8. This follows heavy Oly work — keep it controlled. If the C&J session ran long, drop to 10 KB swings and 8 TTB.

3.title: 52:00-60:00 Cooldown
3.description:
8 min light row or easy bike.
Foam roll mid-back (thoracic, not lumbar).
3.notes: Avoid extreme lumbar extension in foam rolling.

4.title: 00:00-10:00 Warm Up
4.description:
3 Rounds:
10 McGill curl-ups
10 Dead bugs
200m easy Run
10 empty bar thrusters 20/15 kg — focus on bottom position and lockout.
4.notes: Thursday benchmark day. The thruster warm-up here is deliberate — prime the movement pattern before Fran. Back flat on bugs.

4.title: 10:00-15:00 Skill / Accessory
4.description:
DU Progression Phase 1:
4 x 45 sec on / 30 sec rest.
Skill focus: double-bounce rhythm. Count how many times you stop per set — aim to reduce stops week over week.
4.notes: Relax shoulders, spin wrists. Today's DU work is before Fran so keep intensity moderate — don't blow out your legs.

4.title: 15:00-27:00 Strength Block
4.description:
Strict Press:
4x8 @ 65% 1RM = ~42/28 kg.
Accessory: 3x10 DB Rows 22.5/15 kg — chest supported or bent over, strict.
4.notes: No leg drive. Strict press only. Core braced. Thursday press work is intentionally lighter — shoulders will be taxed in Fran pull-ups.

4.title: 27:00-47:00 MetCon
4.description:
Benchmark: Fran
21-15-9
Thrusters 43/30 kg
Pull-ups
All out. Record your time.
4.notes: RPE 10. This is the benchmark — treat it as a race. Strategy: go unbroken on thrusters through 21 if possible. Break pull-ups in sets of 7-5-5 or 10-11. Do NOT pace this — Fran is meant to be painful and fast.

4.title: 47:00-60:00 Cooldown
4.description:
5 min walk.
5 min stretching: lats, hip flexors, quads.
3 min diaphragmatic breathing — lie flat, slow exhales.
4.notes: After Fran, HR will be very high. Walk it down before stretching.

5.title: 00:00-10:00 Warm Up
5.description:
3 Rounds:
10 Bird dogs
30 sec Side plank per side
10 goblet squats 16/12 kg — pause 2 sec in hole.
5.notes: Week 2 Sunday. Core stability before squats.

5.title: 10:00-17:00 Skill / Accessory
5.description:
Wall Ball Progression Phase 1:
4 x 10 quality reps 9/6 kg.
Rest 60 sec.
Focus: consistent depth — hip crease below knee every rep.
5.notes: Week 2 — same volume as Week 1 but dial in the depth cue. Every rep must look the same.

5.title: 17:00-38:00 Strength Block
5.description:
Back Squat:
4x8 @ 65% 1RM = ~84.5/57 kg.
Rest 2 min.
Accessory: 3x12 GHD Hip Extension — neutral spine, squeeze glutes at top.
5.notes: Control the eccentric — 3 sec down, drive up. Phase 1 hypertrophy block. Reduce posterior chain accessory volume if back is fatigued.

5.title: 38:00-46:00 MetCon
5.description:
For Time:
21-15-9
Calorie Ski Erg
Burpees over erg
Target: sub-8 min.
5.notes: Glycolytic. RPE 8-9. Hard sprint after squats.

5.title: 46:00-57:00 Cooldown
5.description:
11 min active recovery: easy walk or slow bike.
Hip flexor stretch 2 min per side.
5.notes: Decrease heart rate gradually before leaving.

6.title: 00:00-10:00 Warm Up
6.description:
3 Rounds:
10 McGill curl-ups
10 Glute bridges
200m easy Row.
6.notes: Monday aerobic day. Activate glutes fully before trap bar work.

6.title: 10:00-17:00 Skill / Accessory
6.description:
Wall Ball Progression Phase 1:
4 x 10 quality reps 9/6 kg.
Rest 60 sec.
Focus: keep elbows high through the catch — don't let them drop below shoulder.
6.notes: Week 2 Monday. Same volume, new cue: elbows high on the catch.

6.title: 17:00-38:00 Strength Block
6.description:
Trap Bar Deadlift (Phase 1 — no conventional DL):
4x8 @ 65% 1RM equivalent (~97.5/65 kg).
Rest 2 min.
Accessory: 3x12 Bulgarian Split Squats — bodyweight or light DBs, focus on balance.
6.notes: Maintain neutral spine throughout. Trap bar allows more upright torso — use it. No shoulder-intensive accessory today — MetCon has pull-ups.

6.title: 38:00-53:00 MetCon
6.description:
Aerobic Engine — 4 Rounds for Time:
500m Row
15 Ring Rows (or Banded Pull-ups at moderate resistance)
Rest 30 sec between rounds.
Target: consistent row splits, smooth ring rows.
6.notes: RPE 7-8. Original session had HSPU here — replaced with ring rows to protect shoulder fatigue accumulation. HSPU after Wednesday Oly lifting and Thursday Fran pull-ups is too much shoulder load in a 4-day block. Ring rows preserve the pulling pattern safely.

6.title: 53:00-60:00 Cooldown
6.description:
7 min stretching.
Child's pose 2 min for back relief.
Lat stretch on rig.

7.title: 00:00-10:00 Warm Up
7.description:
3 Rounds:
10 Dead bugs
10 Hip hinge drills
10 PVC pass-throughs
10 PVC overhead squats.
7.notes: Wednesday snatch day. Shoulder and hip mobility are critical. PVC OHS reveals any overhead restrictions before loading.

7.title: 10:00-20:00 Skill / Accessory
7.description:
DU Progression Phase 1:
4 x 45 sec on / 30 sec rest. Log total reps.
Skill focus: single-leg bounce drill — 10 singles on right foot / 10 on left / 10 double bounce. Teaches weight distribution and timing.
Rest 60 sec after skill drill before intervals.
7.notes: Week 2 DU focus: single-leg drill builds proprioception that carries over to consistency. Stay on toes, rigid core.

7.title: 20:00-40:00 Strength Block
7.description:
Snatch:
5x3 @ 70% 1RM = ~52.5/35 kg.
Rest 90 sec between sets.
Accessory: 3x10 Strict Toes to Bar — full hang, control the lower.
7.notes: Focus on speed under the bar and a strong catch in the hole. No pressing out. If you miss twice at a weight, drop 5 kg and continue.

7.title: 40:00-52:00 MetCon
7.description:
AMRAP 12:
10 Power Snatches 43/30 kg
30 Double Unders
Target: 4-5+ rounds.
7.notes: Moderate pace. RPE 8. The DUs here are a natural skill-in-fatigue test. Note if your DU technique breaks down — this is data.

7.title: 52:00-60:00 Cooldown
7.description:
8 min band stretching.
Band shoulder distraction 2 min per side.
Pigeon pose 90 sec per side.

8.title: 00:00-10:00 Warm Up
8.description:
3 Rounds:
10 McGill curl-ups
30 sec Side plank per side
200m Run at easy pace.
8.notes: Thursday long MetCon day. Core warm-up before running volume.

8.title: 10:00-18:00 Skill / Accessory
8.description:
DU Progression Phase 1:
4 x 45 sec on / 30 sec rest. Log total reps.
Skill focus: 'rhythm lock' — find a cadence and hold it. Count 1-2-3-4 silently to stay locked in.
8.notes: Breathe steadily. Week 2 cue: rhythm over speed.

8.title: 18:00-35:00 Strength Block
8.description:
Push Press:
4x8 @ 70% 1RM = ~45.5/30 kg.
Rest 90 sec.
Accessory: 3x12 DB Bent-over Rows 22.5/15 kg — NOT bench press. Horizontal pull balances the pressing.
8.notes: Solid dip and drive. Changed accessory from DB Bench Press to DB Rows — bench pressing on Thursday after Wednesday snatch and Monday row MetCon accumulates too much shoulder load. Rows balance it and are safer here.

8.title: 35:00-52:00 MetCon
8.description:
5 Rounds for Time:
400m Run
20 Kettlebell Swings 24/16 kg
15 Pull-ups
Target: sub-22 min.
8.notes: Mixed modal long. RPE 8. This is the week's big engine session. Pace the first round conservatively — this gets hard fast.

8.title: 52:00-60:00 Cooldown
8.description:
8 min easy spin on bike or walk.
Shoulder rolls and forearm stretch.

9.title: 00:00-10:00 Warm Up
9.description:
3 Rounds:
10 Bird dogs
10 Glute bridges
10 air squats — pause 2 sec at bottom
10 empty bar front squats 20/15 kg.
9.notes: Week 3 Sunday. Front squat warm-up included — elbows up drill.

9.title: 10:00-17:00 Skill / Accessory
9.description:
Wall Ball Progression Phase 1:
3 x 15 unbroken 9/6 kg.
Rest 90 sec.
Focus: don't drop chest — thoracic extension drives the ball. Aim to go unbroken on all 3 sets.
9.notes: Week 3: shift to 3x15 unbroken. Total volume drops slightly but the unbroken intent is the key stimulus — it builds the mental and physiological pattern needed for Phase 2's 3x20. If you break before 15, note the rep number and beat it next set.

9.title: 17:00-38:00 Strength Block
9.description:
Front Squat:
4x6 @ 72% 1RM = ~79/53 kg.
Rest 2 min.
Accessory: 3x12 GHD Hip Extension — controlled, squeeze at top.
9.notes: Keep elbows high — a dropped elbow is a rounded back. Brace core before every rep. Reduce posterior accessory volume if this follows a heavy day.

9.title: 38:00-46:00 MetCon
9.description:
For Time:
30-20-10
Assault Bike Cals
Alternating DB Snatches 22.5/15 kg
Target: sub-10 min.
9.notes: Glycolytic focus. Go hard on the bike. RPE 8-9.

9.title: 46:00-58:00 Cooldown
9.description:
12 min stretching.
Focus: quads, hip flexors, thoracic rotation.

10.title: 00:00-10:00 Warm Up
10.description:
3 Rounds:
10 McGill curl-ups
10 Hip hinge drills
200m easy Row.
10.notes: Monday aerobic day. Protect the back — focus on hinge quality in warm-up.

10.title: 10:00-17:00 Skill / Accessory
10.description:
Wall Ball Progression Phase 1:
3 x 15 unbroken 9/6 kg.
Rest 90 sec.
Focus: fluid motion — use hip power, not just arms. Same unbroken target as Sunday.
10.notes: Week 3 Monday. Match Sunday's 3x15 unbroken format. Drive from hips, not shoulders. Note your break point if it comes before 15.

10.title: 17:00-38:00 Strength Block
10.description:
RDL (Phase 1 — no conventional DL from floor):
4x8 @ 70% 1RM DL = ~105/70 kg.
Rest 2 min.
Accessory: 3x10 Nordic Curls — slow eccentric.
10.notes: Progressing to 70% this week. Maintain perfect hinge — no spinal flexion under load. Still Phase 1: no conventional DL from floor.

10.title: 38:00-53:00 MetCon
10.description:
EMOM 15:
Min 1: 15 Cal Row
Min 2: 15 Burpees
Min 3: 45 sec Plank hold
Target: complete each station with at least 10 sec rest.
10.notes: Engine building. Aerobic-heavy. RPE 7-8. Keep HR steady across all 5 rounds — don't spike on the burpees.

10.title: 53:00-60:00 Cooldown
10.description:
7 min light movement or walk.
Hamstring stretch 2 min per side.

11.title: 00:00-10:00 Warm Up
11.description:
3 Rounds:
10 Dead bugs
30 sec Side plank
10 PVC snatches — emphasize turnover
10 PVC clean pulls.
11.notes: Wednesday Oly day. Rigid core on dead bugs. Hip and shoulder prep for clean & jerk.

11.title: 10:00-20:00 Skill / Accessory
11.description:
DU Progression Phase 1:
4 x 45 sec on / 30 sec rest. Log total reps.
Skill focus: 'micro-pause reset' drill — if you trip, immediately restart without walking away. Trains mental composure.
11.notes: Week 3 DU cue: composure after a miss. Most athletes lose more time hesitating after a trip than from the trip itself.

11.title: 20:00-40:00 Strength Block
11.description:
Clean & Jerk:
5x3 @ 70% 1RM = ~57.5/38 kg.
Rest 90 sec.
Accessory: 3x12 Weighted Ring Dips — add weight if bodyweight is easy.
11.notes: Smooth transitions — receive the clean and immediately set up for the jerk, don't pause excessively. Ring dips are pushing accessory, which is fine here as it's not shoulder-intensive overhead press volume.

11.title: 40:00-52:00 MetCon
11.description:
AMRAP 12:
5 Clean & Jerks 60/40 kg
10 Chest-to-Bar Pull-ups
Target: 5+ rounds.
11.notes: Moderate RPE 7-8. Touch-and-go on C&J if form allows. Break C2B into 5+5 to preserve grip.

11.title: 52:00-60:00 Cooldown
11.description:
8 min stretching.
Forearm and wrist mobility.
Pigeon pose 90 sec each side.

12.title: 00:00-10:00 Warm Up
12.description:
3 Rounds:
10 Bird dogs
10 McGill curl-ups
200m easy Run.
12.notes: Thursday long MetCon. Core and movement prep.

12.title: 10:00-18:00 Skill / Accessory
12.description:
DU Progression Phase 1:
4 x 45 sec on / 30 sec rest. Log total reps.
Skill focus: aim for unbroken sets. If you hit 30+ in any set, that's a marker — note it.
12.notes: Week 3 Thursday: push for unbroken. Note which set you go longest unbroken.

12.title: 18:00-35:00 Strength Block
12.description:
Strict Press:
4x6 @ 72% 1RM = ~47/31 kg.
Rest 90 sec.
Accessory: 3x12 DB Rows 22.5/15 kg.
12.notes: No lumbar hyperextension on press — ribs down, glutes engaged. Intensity stepping up from 65% to 72% this week.

12.title: 35:00-52:00 MetCon
12.description:
AMRAP 17:
400m Run
21 Wall Balls 9/6 kg
12 Pull-ups
Target: 4+ rounds.
12.notes: Oxidative. RPE 8. Consistent pace every round — use the wall balls as a recovery movement between run and pull-ups.

12.title: 52:00-60:00 Cooldown
12.description:
8 min foam rolling.
Focus: thoracic spine and quads.
Avoid direct lumbar rolling.

13.title: 00:00-10:00 Warm Up
13.description:
3 Rounds:
10 McGill curl-ups
10 Glute bridges
200m easy Bike.
Easy pace throughout.
13.notes: DELOAD WEEK 4. Volume drops 40%. No new 1RM attempts. Protect the body.

13.title: 10:00-15:00 Skill / Accessory
13.description:
Wall Ball Progression (Deload):
3 x 10 reps 9/6 kg.
Rest 90 sec.
Focus on perfect form only.
13.notes: Deload: volume reduced from 3x15 to 3x10. Use this to refine mechanics — quality over quantity.

13.title: 15:00-30:00 Strength Block
13.description:
Back Squat (Deload):
3x5 @ 60% 1RM = ~78/52 kg.
Focus on bar speed — explosive concentric.
Accessory: 2x10 GHD Hip Extension.
13.notes: Lighter weight = prioritize speed and perfect positioning. No grinding.

13.title: 30:00-40:00 MetCon
13.description:
AMRAP 10:
10 Thrusters 30/20 kg
10 Burpees
Target: 5+ rounds — this is light.
13.notes: Light load. RPE 6-7. Move smoothly, don't compete with yourself. Deload means deload.

13.title: 40:00-57:00 Cooldown
13.description:
17 min comprehensive stretching and mobility.
Focus: back, hips, thoracic spine.
Deep squat holds, pigeon, couch stretch.
13.notes: Prioritize back and hips — give them real attention during this deload.

14.title: 00:00-10:00 Warm Up
14.description:
3 Rounds:
10 Dead bugs
10 Hip hinge drills
200m easy Row.

14.title: 10:00-15:00 Skill / Accessory
14.description:
Wall Ball Progression (Deload):
3 x 10 reps 9/6 kg.
Rest 90 sec.
Perfect reps only — use this as a technique reset.
14.notes: Deload doesn't mean sloppy. Perfect movement.

14.title: 15:00-30:00 Strength Block
14.description:
RDL (Deload — Phase 1 still):
3x6 @ 60% 1RM DL = ~90/60 kg.
Accessory: 2x10 Nordic Curls.
14.notes: Keep it light. No conventional DL — still in Phase 1 protocol.

14.title: 30:00-45:00 MetCon
14.description:
4 Rounds for Time:
400m Row
15 Kettlebell Swings 16/12 kg
Rest 30 sec between rounds.

14.title: 45:00-60:00 Cooldown
14.description:
15 min mobility.
Hamstring floss, hip 90/90, overhead reach.

15.title: 00:00-10:00 Warm Up
15.description:
3 Rounds:
10 Bird dogs
30 sec Side plank
10 PVC Snatch — focus on footwork.
15.notes: Deload Wednesday. Core active, easy pace.

15.title: 10:00-18:00 Skill / Accessory
15.description:
DU Progression (Deload):
3 x 30 sec on / 30 sec rest.
Skill focus: intentionally slow the rope — find the minimum speed needed to clear. Builds control.
15.notes: Deload DU volume. Skill cue: minimum viable speed. Athletes often spin too fast — this drill breaks the habit.

15.title: 18:00-35:00 Strength Block
15.description:
Clean & Jerk (Deload):
3x3 @ 60% 1RM = ~49.5/33 kg.
Crisp, fast, technically perfect.
Accessory: 2x10 Strict Toes to Bar.
15.notes: Light load, perfect technique. These should feel almost easy.

15.title: 35:00-45:00 MetCon
15.description:
EMOM 10:
Min 1: 30 DUs
Min 2: 10 Pull-ups
RPE 6 — do not redline.
15.notes: Deload MetCon. Keep it chill. If you miss DUs, singles are fine.

15.title: 45:00-60:00 Cooldown
15.description:
15 min full-body stretching.
Shoulder mobility focus: band distractions, sleeper stretch.

16.title: 00:00-10:00 Warm Up
16.description:
3 Rounds:
10 McGill curl-ups
10 Glute bridges
200m easy Run.

16.title: 10:00-18:00 Skill / Accessory
16.description:
DU Progression (Deload):
3 x 30 sec on / 30 sec rest.
Skill focus: 'tall and quiet' — stand tall, keep feet together, minimize sound on landing.
16.notes: Loud landing = heel striking = broken rhythm. Quiet feet = better DUs.

16.title: 18:00-33:00 Strength Block
16.description:
Strict Press (Deload):
3x6 @ 60% 1RM = ~39/26 kg.
Accessory: 2x10 DB Rows 15/10 kg.
16.notes: Light and clean. This is active recovery, not stimulus.

16.title: 33:00-43:00 MetCon
16.description:
AMRAP 10:
200m Run
10 Box Jumps 24/20 inch
RPE 6. Easy pace.
16.notes: Deload MetCon. Step down off box — no depth jumps.

16.title: 43:00-60:00 Cooldown
16.description:
17 min full recovery protocol.
Foam roll legs and back.
Static stretching full body.
16.notes: Use this extra time — the deload week earns it.

17.title: 00:00-12:00 Warm Up
17.description:
3 Rounds:
10 McGill curl-ups
10 Bird dogs
200m Row
10 empty bar back squats with 3 sec pause at bottom.
Build to 50% of working weight on final warm-up set.
17.notes: PHASE 2 STARTS. Strength intensification — heavier loads, fewer reps. Warm-up must include barbell build-up sets before working sets at 78%+.

17.title: 12:00-20:00 Skill / Accessory
17.description:
Wall Ball Progression Phase 2:
3 x 20 unbroken 9/6 kg.
Rest 90 sec between sets.
Note which set the first break occurs.
17.notes: Phase 2 progression: 3x20 unbroken. If you can't hit 20 unbroken, rest at set 15 and go again. Note your break point each week — it should move later.

17.title: 20:00-42:00 Strength Block
17.description:
Back Squat (Phase 2):
5x5 @ 78% 1RM = ~101.5/68 kg.
Rest 2-3 min between sets.
No accessory posterior chain today — heavy squats cover it.
17.notes: Heavy strength. Reduce posterior chain accessory volume this session. Brace before every descent. If rep 5 is a grind, stay at this weight next week.

17.title: 42:00-50:00 MetCon
17.description:
For Time (<8 min):
21-15-9
Front Squat 43/30 kg
Bar-facing burpees
Target: sub-6 min.
17.notes: Glycolytic sprint. RPE 9. Legs are heavy — embrace it. This simulates competition fatigue.

17.title: 50:00-60:00 Cooldown
17.description:
10 min cool down walk and thoracic mobility.
Couch stretch 2 min per side.

18.title: 00:00-10:00 Warm Up
18.description:
3 Rounds:
10 Dead bugs
30 sec Side plank
200m easy Bike.
Hip hinge drill with dowel before strength block.
18.notes: Phase 2 Monday. First session with conventional deadlift — warm-up must include deliberate hinge preparation.

18.title: 10:00-18:00 Skill / Accessory
18.description:
Wall Ball Progression Phase 2:
3 x 20 unbroken 9/6 kg.
Rest 90 sec.
Focus: push for unbroken — don't break at 15 out of habit.
18.notes: Week 5. Track your break point. Aim for at least one unbroken set of 20.

18.title: 18:00-38:00 Strength Block
18.description:
Conventional Deadlift (Phase 2 — introduced at RPE 6-7 max):
4x5 @ RPE 6-7. Estimated load: ~112-120/75-80 kg.
Rest 2-3 min.
Accessory: 3x10 Nordic Curls — slow eccentric only.
18.notes: Phase 2 introduces conventional DL from the floor. RPE 6-7 is a hard ceiling — stop adding weight if form deteriorates. Stop immediately if lower back tightens. This is a reintroduction, not a max effort.

18.title: 38:00-50:00 MetCon
18.description:
4 Rounds for Time:
400m Run
15 Toes to Bar
Target: sub-14 min.
18.notes: RPE 8-9. Mid time domain. Core should be somewhat fatigued from DL — manage TTB sets accordingly (sets of 5-7).

18.title: 50:00-60:00 Cooldown
18.description:
10 min stretch.
Focus: hamstrings and hip flexors after deadlifts.

19.title: 00:00-10:00 Warm Up
19.description:
3 Rounds:
10 Glute bridges
10 Hip hinge drills
10 PVC Pass-throughs
5 PVC overhead squats.
19.notes: Wednesday Oly day. Phase 2 — building to heavy doubles.

19.title: 10:00-20:00 Skill / Accessory
19.description:

5 max unbroken attempts. 90 sec rest between.
